title: Test the full quote flow
description: Send a test quote to verify Booqable and Stripe are working

title: Configure GHL webhook URL
description: Set https://gorillahq.up.railway.app/webhook/whatsapp as webhook in GHL settings

title: Add Azure SharePoint permissions
description: Add Sites.ReadWrite.All and Files.ReadWrite.All in Azure portal

title: Test morning briefing
description: Manually trigger morning briefing via POST /admin/briefing to verify WhatsApp delivery

title: Run first knowledge sweep
description: Trigger POST /knowledge/sweep to start learning from competitor sites
